meta.employment_method: Per-occupation counts are proportionally scaled so meta.total_employment matches AISCOPE_TARGET_TOTAL_EMPLOYMENT (default 3_720_000) while preserving relative weights across SSOC rows (corrects synthetic pipeline double-counting).
